export default "**Languages & Backend**\nJava, Spring Boot, Node.js, REST APIs, Microservices\n\n**Distributed Systems**\nEvent-Driven Architecture, Streaming Systems (Kinesis/Kafka concepts), Asynchronous Processing, Resiliency Patterns\n\n**Cloud & Infrastructure**\nAWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, Kinesis, RDS), Docker, Kubernetes (EKS), CI/CD (Jenkins), Infrastructure Concepts (Terraform)\n\n**Data & Persistence**\nPostgreSQL, MySQL, Query Optimization, Data Modeling\n\n**Testing**\nUnit Testing (JUnit), Integration Testing, Mocking Concepts (Mockito)\n\n**Monitoring & Reliability**\nLogging, CloudWatch, Observability Concepts (Datadog), Incident Management\n\n**Engineering Practices**\nSOLID Principles, Microservices Design, Code Reviews, Agile Development"
